transfers.title: Antoine Semenyo joins Manchester City
transfers.brief_details: Manchester City signed Antoine Semenyo from Bournemouth for a reported £64m. The Ghana international signed a five-and-a-half-year contract with the Premier League champions.

transfers.title: Oscar Bobb completes move to Fulham
transfers.brief_details: Fulham completed the signing of Norwegian winger Oscar Bobb from Manchester City for £27 million to strengthen their attack.

transfers.title: Jorgen Strand Larsen joins Crystal Palace
transfers.brief_details: Crystal Palace signed Norwegian striker Jorgen Strand Larsen from Wolves in a deal worth around £48 million during the January transfer window.

transfers.title: Luca Netz signs for Nottingham Forest
transfers.brief_details: Nottingham Forest secured German left-back Luca Netz from Borussia Monchengladbach for around £2 million on deadline day.

transfers.title: Ademola Lookman joins Atletico Madrid
transfers.brief_details: Atletico Madrid signed Nigerian winger Ademola Lookman from Atalanta for approximately £30.2 million to strengthen their attack.

transfers.title: Lorenzo Lucca signs for Napoli
transfers.brief_details: Napoli completed the signing of Italian striker Lorenzo Lucca from Pisa for around £30 million during the winter transfer window.

transfers.title: Iqraam Rayners joins Mamelodi Sundowns
transfers.brief_details: Mamelodi Sundowns completed the signing of South African striker Iqraam Rayners from Stellenbosch FC to strengthen their forward line.

transfers.title: Ryan Ogam joins Tusker FC
transfers.brief_details: Tusker FC confirmed the signing of striker Ryan Ogam from Rainbow FC to reinforce their attacking options in the Kenyan Premier League.

transfers.title: Junior Lokosa signs for Enyimba
transfers.brief_details: Nigerian striker Junior Lokosa returned to Enyimba FC after previous spells abroad, boosting the club’s attacking lineup.

transfers.title: Denis Omedi joins APR FC from Kitara
transfers.brief_details: Ugandan forward Denis Omedi moved from Kitara FC to Rwandan giants APR FC after an impressive season in the Uganda Premier League.

transfers.title: Nicolás De La Cruz joins Flamengo
transfers.brief_details: Brazilian giants Flamengo completed the signing of Uruguayan midfielder Nicolás De La Cruz from River Plate in a deal worth around €16 million.

transfers.title: Abubeker Nasir signs for Ethiopian Coffee
transfers.brief_details: Ethiopian Coffee confirmed the signing of striker Abubeker Nasir after returning from Mamelodi Sundowns.

transfers.title: Imam Ashour joins Al Ahly
transfers.brief_details: Egyptian giants Al Ahly signed midfielder Imam Ashour from Danish side FC Midtjylland.

transfers.title: Ayoub El Kaabi joins Wydad Casablanca
transfers.brief_details: Moroccan striker Ayoub El Kaabi joined Wydad Athletic Club to reinforce their attacking line.

transfers.title: Ivan Ahimbisibwe joins KCCA FC
transfers.brief_details: KCCA FC announced the signing of prolific striker Ivan Ahimbisibwe, nicknamed 'The Hunter', from URA FC on a two-year contract. The forward joined after scoring 16 league goals in the 2024/25 Uganda Premier League season.

transfers.title: Romelu Lukaku joins AS Roma
transfers.brief_details: AS Roma secured the signing of Belgian striker Romelu Lukaku from Chelsea on loan.

transfers.title: Luis Díaz joins Bayern Munich from Liverpool
transfers.brief_details: Bayern Munich completed the signing of Colombian winger Luis Díaz from Liverpool as part of their squad rebuild. The pacey attacker joined the Bundesliga champions after three seasons at Anfield where he won the FA Cup and Carabao Cup.

transfers.title: Young Africans sign Prince Dube
transfers.brief_details: Tanzanian champions Young Africans SC completed the signing of Zimbabwean striker Prince Dube from Azam FC.
